meaning: adj.能产生多种效果(或结果)的
examples: For the UCI study, multipotent human neural stem cells were transplanted into the brains of rats that had undergone radiation treatment.
ConclusionsThe transplanted multipotent NSCs could survive, differentiate into functional dopamine neurons in the brains of PD model mice.
Conclusions SPTP may originate from primitive multipotent stem cell. The differential diagnosis should be made from other tumors of the pancreas.
